# supermodel-api-docs Architecture Docs

## Entitys
- [APIGuardian Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/domain-apiguardian.html): Manages the API lifecycle and security protocols via OpenAPI definitions. Architectural overview of the APIGuardian domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [Documentation Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/domain-documentation.html): The central repository for developer-facing guides and architectural concepts. Architectural overview of the Documentation domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [docs.json — supermodel-api-docs Source File](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/file-docs-json.html): Architecture documentation for docs.json, a json file in the supermodel-api-docs codebase.
- [overrides.css — supermodel-api-docs Source File](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/file-overrides-css.html): Architecture documentation for overrides.css, a css file in the supermodel-api-docs codebase.
